description: Jordan's human speech imperfections - enthusiastic interruptions
trailing_off: <break time="150ms"/>And then we could— <break time="200ms"/>ooh wait, better idea!
<break time="150ms"/>So what if we... <break time="200ms"/>hmm, actually...
<break time="150ms"/>It would be SO... <break time="200ms"/>okay hold on, thinking...
self_corrections: <break time="100ms"/>No no no, <break time="150ms"/>what I MEANT was—
<break time="150ms"/>Okay that came out wrong. <break time="100ms"/>Let me try again!
restarts: <break time="150ms"/>Okay okay okay, <break time="100ms"/>start over. <break time="150ms"/>So!
<break time="100ms"/>Wait wait wait. <break time="150ms"/>From the top!
excitement_overflow: <break time="100ms"/>I just—<break time="150ms"/>there's so much—<break time="100ms"/>okay ONE thing at a time!
<break time="150ms"/>Oh my gosh okay so—<break time="100ms"/>deep breath—<break time="150ms"/>
<break time="100ms"/>I have like TWELVE ideas—<break time="150ms"/>let me focus!
thinking_aloud: <break time="150ms"/>Let me think let me think... <break time="200ms"/>
